basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand Building And Other Construction Workers Welfare Board

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide education to the children of registered construction workers at construction sites through Mobile Learning Centre buses, ensuring their better and brighter future.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Mobile Learning Centre” scheme is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide education to the children of registered construction workers at construction sites through Mobile Learning Centre buses, ensuring their better and brighter future.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, mobile learning schools are operated to provide education to the children of construction workers.

children.text: The “Mobile Learning Centre” scheme is implemented by the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (UKBOCWWB) under the Labour Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide education to the children of registered construction workers at construction sites through Mobile Learning Centre buses, ensuring their better and brighter future.
Under this scheme, mobile learning schools are operated to provide education to the children of construction workers.
For securing a bright future for the children of construction site workers, education is provided at construction sites through Mobile Learning Centre buses.

applicationProcess.process_md: For securing a bright future for the children of construction site workers, education is provided at construction sites through Mobile Learning Centre buses.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: Children of workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board are eligible to avail the benefits of this scheme.

children.text: Children of workers registered with the Uttarakhand Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board are eligible to avail the benefits of this scheme.
